# Get Credit

Get Credit is a loan consultancy and DSA in India offering home loans, personal loans, business loans, education loans and loan against property with 50+ banking partners.

Our services include:
- Home Loan: Financing up to ₹15 Crore for buying your dream home
- Personal Loan: Quick funds with same-day disbursement starting from 9.99%
- Business Loan: Flexible funding solutions for MSME and business growth
- Education Loan: Fund studies in India (up to ₹50L) or abroad (up to ₹1.5Cr, no collateral)
- Loan Against Property: Funding up to ₹30 Crore against residential, commercial property or plot

Contact: https://get-credit.in/contact
Email: support@get-credit.in
Phone: +91 7738205198
Location: Ambernath, Thane, Maharashtra, India
